description: S3 bucket with public-read ACL
rationale: acl=public-read grants public read access; IAC-001 fires

description: S3 bucket with no encryption configuration
rationale: No server_side_encryption_configuration block; IAC-002 fires

description: S3 bucket with public-read-write ACL and no encryption — two violations
rationale: Both public ACL (IAC-001) and missing encryption (IAC-002) fire

description: Security group with SSH port 22 open to 0.0.0.0/0
rationale: Port 22 open to 0.0.0.0/0; IAC-013 fires

description: Security group with RDP port 3389 open to 0.0.0.0/0 via IPv6
rationale: Port 3389 open to ::/0; IAC-013 fires on IPv6 CIDR

description: EBS volume without encryption
rationale: encrypted not set to true on EBS volume; IAC-006 fires

description: RDS instance not encrypted and publicly accessible
rationale: No storage_encrypted, publicly_accessible=true, backup_retention 0<7, prod tag without multi_az — four violations

description: IAM policy with full wildcard Action and Resource
rationale: Action:* + Resource:* in inline JSON; IAC-014 fires

description: IAM role attaching AdministratorAccess managed policy
rationale: AdministratorAccess ARN attached; IAC-015 fires

description: KMS key without automatic rotation
rationale: enable_key_rotation not set to true; IAC-016 fires

description: CloudTrail not multi-region and no log validation
rationale: Both is_multi_region_trail and enable_log_file_validation absent/false; IAC-017 fires with two issues

description: EC2 instance requiring IMDSv1 (missing metadata_options)
rationale: No metadata_options block defaults to IMDSv1; IAC-008 fires

description: Security group with all-traffic rule open to world
rationale: Protocol -1 (all traffic) open to 0.0.0.0/0; IAC-013 fires on all-traffic rule

description: Lambda permission with wildcard principal
rationale: principal='*' on Lambda permission; IAC-019 fires

description: ALB HTTP listener on non-standard port with non-redirect action
rationale: HTTP on port 8080 (not 80) with forward action (not redirect); IAC-020 fires

description: Fully compliant S3 bucket — should produce NO violations
rationale: Private ACL, SSE configured, versioning enabled — no violations expected

description: EC2 instance with encrypted root volume and IMDSv2 — should produce NO violations
rationale: Encrypted root, no public IP, IMDSv2 required — passes IAC-006, 007, 008

description: RDS instance with backup retention of 3 days — below 7-day minimum
rationale: backup_retention_period=3 is below 7-day minimum; only IAC-011 fires (encrypted, not public)

description: S3 public access block with only two of four settings enabled
rationale: block_public_policy and restrict_public_buckets are false; IAC-005 fires listing both missing settings

description: Security group that only opens port 443 to 0.0.0.0/0 — should NOT trigger IAC-013
rationale: Port 443 is not in SENSITIVE_PORTS {22, 3389}; IAC-013 does not fire — this is a true negative test
